Document:
# Vox
[bold][color=#ff0]This species is not reccomended to new players[/color], due to a strict resource management mechanic.[/bold]
[bold]Vox[/bold] are a [bold][color=#f44]Nitrogen-breathing[/color][/bold], [bold][color=#94f]Ammonia-blooded[/color][/bold] species; with large beaks, long tails, and a crooked posture.
Vox are [bold][color=#ff0]lethally allergic[/color] to [color=#4df]Oxygen[/color][/bold], taking [bold][color=#94f]Poison[/color] damage[/bold] when metabolizing it. Therefore, all Vox start their shift already wearing working [bold]internals equipment[/bold], without which, standard station air will [bold]kill them in minutes[/bold].
Vox have the baseline body temperature of [bold][color=yellow]37°C[/color][/bold] (~[color=yellow]310°K[/color]). They experience the effects of [bold]hypothermia at [color=#4df]-13°C[/color][/bold] and [bold]hyperthermia at [color=#f44]52°C[/color][/bold]. (~[color=#4df]260°K[/color] & [color=#f44]325°K[/color])
Vox are [bold]omnivorous[/bold], meaning they they can safely digest [bold]meat and plant based foods[/bold], Vox can also [bold]safely digest raw meat and blood[/bold], as well as [bold]packaging, welding fuel, cigarettes[/bold], and other meals which would be hazardous to most other species.
Their bodies can process [bold]2 reagents[/bold] at a time.
Vox slowly [bold]passively regenerate[/bold] all types of [bold][color=yellow]Brute[/color] damage[/bold], and indivudually [bold][color=#f44]Heat[/color] damage[/bold] and [bold][color=#94f]Poison[/color] damage[/bold]. Thirty seconds of [bold][color=#4df]Oxygen exposure[/color][/bold] takes [bold]around two minutes[/bold] to heal.
Vox names typically consist of short, repeating syllables, frequenting tap [color=#999](/t, d/)[/color], trill [color=#999](/r/)[/color], and stop [color=#999](/k/)[/color] sounds.
